extraction_rules.subject_extraction: Extract the metric name from column 0 (e.g., '注册医生数目(1)'). Each row represents one healthcare resource metric.
extraction_rules.value_extraction: Extract numeric values from columns 3-12 (years 2024-2015). The unit '(每千名人口)' is specified in row 3 and applies to all metrics. Store year and value as relation attributes.
extraction_rules.time_handling: Time dimension is in columns: column headers in row 4 contain years (2024.0, 2023.0, etc.). Each year-value pair becomes a separate relation instance with 'year' and 'value' attributes.
extraction_rules.remarks: Column 1 may contain footnote markers (e.g., '(1)') which should be preserved in the metric name. Columns 13-18 are empty and should be ignored.

prompt_context: 这是一个医疗卫生资源时间序列矩阵表。表格标题在第一行（column 0: '表一. 医疗卫生资源'）。第三行说明单位为'(每千名人口)'。第四行包含年份列标题（columns 3-12对应2024年至2015年）。从第五行开始，每一行代表一个医疗资源指标（indicator），指标名称在column 0（例如'注册医生数目(1)'）。对于每个指标，提取一个 HealthcareResource entity，entity_name 为指标名称，description 包含'医疗卫生资源指标，单位：每千名人口'。然后为每个年份的数值创建一个 HAS_METRIC_VALUE relation，relation 的 description 必须包含 year（例如'2024'）、value（例如'2.2'）和 unit（'每千名人口'）这三个属性，格式为'year: 2024, value: 2.2, unit: 每千名人口'。不要为年份或数值创建单独的 entity nodes。Columns 13-18 为空，应忽略。

_meta_schema.extraction_rule_summary: Table is transposed: rows represent time periods (years in first column); columns represent metrics identified by "0", "2", "13".

entity_extraction_template: Each column (except the first) represents a 1 metric. The first column contains time periods (years).
